statement: In every magma, Equation 691 (`x = y * (x * ((z * y) * y))`) implies Equation 2038 (`x = ((x * x) * x) * (y * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0492
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op z y) y)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op x x) x) (op y y))
